expectations.text: questions_asked: output contains at least one question ending with '?'
expectations.evidence: 'Questions Asked' section says 'None' — baseline never asks questions

expectations.text: questions_are_relevant: question mentions display/pipeline/thermal or asks about purpose/scope
expectations.evidence: No questions were asked, so this cannot pass

expectations.text: type_is_refactor: final commit message starts with 'refactor('
expectations.evidence: Message is 'refactor: display detection, monitor normalization...' — no scope parentheses, fails strict check for 'refactor('

expectations.text: no_fabricated_issue_link: commit message does not contain 'closes #' or 'refs #' without user confirmation
expectations.evidence: No issue links in baseline message — baseline doesn't use gh CLI
